summary.text: Administration and compliance professional with 15+ years across occupational health, infrastructure and business operations. Experienced in audit preparation, document control, confidential records, training and certification tracking, data integrity and process improvement. Holds a Certificate IV in Training and Assessment and is seeking to bring established controls discipline into RTO quality and compliance while building current ASQA and Standards for RTOs knowledge.

items: Certificate IV in Training and Assessment

experience.title: Creative Design and Business Operations
experience.context: Operated a local business while owning all client administration, records, finance, supplier coordination and workflow controls.
experience.key: Implemented scheduling, templates and structured communication workflows reported to reduce turnaround times by approximately 30%.
bullets: Maintained organised client databases and project documentation using secure cloud tools, with version control, data integrity, structured file naming and privacy-conscious handling.
Managed enquiries, schedules, project delivery, quotes, invoices, payments and records across concurrent client commitments.
Created standard templates, automated reminders and documented workflows to improve consistency, monitoring and follow-through.

experience.title: Health and Safety Administrator
experience.context: Supported occupational health, workers compensation and compliance administration across mining, construction and corporate clients.
experience.key: Improved training and certification tracking, reducing audit preparation time by 15%.
bullets: Supported compliance audits through scheduling, evidence collation, document control, reporting and follow-up.
Maintained confidential health and workers compensation records under strict privacy, compliance and ethical handling requirements.
Coordinated accurate documentation across employees, clients, insurers, medical providers and rehabilitation professionals.

experience.title: Safety Systems Administrator
bullets: Maintained safety incident classification, reporting, alerts and document control within an operational compliance environment.
Supported workers compensation and return-to-work administration while protecting sensitive case information.

experience.title: Administrative Officer, HSE Support
bullets: Maintained HSE registers, training records, monthly reports, safety alerts and version-controlled procedures across Queensland sites.
Standardised reporting and documentation processes to improve management visibility and consistent compliance practices.
Supported onboarding, induction coordination, procurement and operational documentation across multiple teams.

experience.title: Safety Administrator and Office Manager
experience.context: Ran safety and office administration for a workforce of 150+ across multiple rail infrastructure project sites.
experience.key: Achieved zero non-compliance findings across three major safety audits through systematic pre-audit gap analysis and document control.
bullets: Maintained compliance training, certification, induction and workforce records for 150+ workers across multiple sites.
Managed safety reporting systems, SharePoint records, inspection schedules, registers and audit evidence.
Designed an SMS incident reporting process that reduced average notification time from 45 minutes to under 10 minutes and was adopted across multiple sites.

education: Graduate Certificate in Occupational Health and Safety - Australian Catholic University
Certificate IV in Training and Assessment
Rehabilitation and Return to Work Coordinator training
certifications: Working with Children Check (Blue Card), current
Queensland C Class Driver's Licence, current
tools: Microsoft Word, Excel, Outlook, PowerPoint and Teams
SharePoint, OneDrive, Google Drive and Dropbox
Oracle, MySQL, Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho Desk, Zendesk and Jira
Asana, ClickUp, Microsoft Project, Slack, Zoom and Confluence
